notes: Clean Menu Core build: keeps proven comments core untouched.
Replaces archive-lite boot layer with adminkit-clean-menu-core filtered archive handling.
Archive Lite hides technical records: sp*, global, stress, debug, selftest and Post Zero.
Start menu is served by clean menu core with Archive / Restore button.
No external code.run /app comments button, native open_app remains product path.
No overlay, no floating hints, no visual redesign.
Remaining legacy layers are reported in debug audit and should be removed later only after equivalent core code is confirmed.
